title: calea lucidivenia var. orientalis
intro: Calea lucidivenia var. orientalis, also known as Mexican Dream Herb, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Calea lucidivenia var. orientalis include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
